description: Evaluates content management service maturity—mobile content tracking, policies, downloadable content monitoring, distribution, virtual workspaces, mobile firmware management, and golden images.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: Mobile content is tracked as part of the content management service and reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Enterprise-wide content management policy is formalized, documented, and reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Downloadable content
capabilities.description: A system or MDM monitors and manages downloadable content on mobiles at enterprise level.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise downloadable content monitoring and management

capabilities.name: Distribution
capabilities.description: A system or MDM distributes select content on mobiles at enterprise level.

capabilities.name: Content Management
capabilities.description: Software or MDM manages virtual spaces on corporate-owned personal mobiles with automated provisioning.
evaluation_focus: Virtual workspace management on corporate-owned personal mobiles

capabilities.name: Mobile Application Management
capabilities.description: Software or MDM upgrades mobile device firmware remotely with automated upgrade triggers.

capabilities.name: Golden Images
capabilities.description: Golden images for assets especially endpoints are maintained, deployed enterprise-wide, applied during provisioning, and reviewed frequently.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
